covers.api: pymatgen Outcar.born (VASP LEPSILON, 'BORN EFFECTIVE CHARGES' section), shape (n_atoms, 3, 3), units of e
pymatgen Outcar.dielectric_tensor (VASP LEPSILON, static clamped-ion 3x3), dimensionless
pymatgen Outcar.elastic_modulus (VASP IBRION=6 'TOTAL ELASTIC MODULI (kBar)'), kbar; atomate2 ElasticMaker
pymatgen Vasprun.complete_dos.densities (total DOS), states/eV vs energy grid; efermi from CompleteDos
atomate2 TaskDoc.output.forces; pymatgen Vasprun.forces[-1] (final ionic step), eV/A
pymatgen Outcar.magnetization (per site) / Outcar.total_magnetization (cell), mu_B; ISPIN=2 collinear
atomate2 TaskDoc.output.stress (emmet OutputDoc, kbar) / pymatgen Vasprun.stress[-1] (kbar)
VASP POSCAR (input) / CONTCAR (relaxed); atomate2 TaskDoc.structure, pymatgen Vasprun.final_structure
